text.title: tracker-jira-rovo-mcp-agents Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tracker-jira-rovo-mcp-agents as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: One shared service account with jira-admins group used by every agent.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Audit log says "service-account did everything"; the agent layer is opaque to compliance, and any compromise of the secret grants admin to whoever holds it.

failure-mode.description: Agent posts a Slack message asking for thumbs-up to move the ticket forward.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The approval lives in Slack, not in Jira; the audit log on the issue shows the agent advanced status with no record of who approved. Use Jira's transition approver list instead.
